creator: danmcgrath.ca@gmail.com
text:
It would appear that vault 1.7.3 from 2021Q3 is failing to fetch:

  Finished security/vault | vault-1.7.3: Failed: fetch

=> hashicorp-vault-v1.7.3_GH0.tar.gz doesn't seem to exist in /portdistfiles/.
